text: impl gate: plugin bundle built against the frozen suite -- all 20 bundle.feature scenarios pass (cold sdd-impl-judge, independently re-exercised). WorkspaceVersionSource reads local package.json via nearest-ancestor pnpm-workspace.yaml; pin-exempt = frontmatter pin-exempt:true, directory-scoped; external + unreadable-workspace both skip. build narrowed to manifests-only; registry pin path fully removed (registry.ts + RangeStyle/pickTarget/styleRange/compareSemver/normalizeRange dead-code deleted). pnpm verify GREEN (19/19). Project stays approved: build's 3 AXI-output scenarios remain un-implemented (pre-existing, standing README note, tracked follow-up) -- no implemented advance.
